description: Newer fact recalled preferentially over older contradicting fact

facts.content: The deploy timeout was set to 10 minutes
The deploy timeout was updated to 20 minutes after load-test findings

description: Older fact still accessible after newer unrelated fact stored

description: Facts remain accessible after significant simulated time advance

The staging replica is PostgreSQL 14 without pgvector

description: Explicit date string in fact content preserved after time advance

Prior to March 2024, the SLA was 99.9 percent uptime

description: Consolidation preserves the newer of two related facts

The connection pool max was raised to 200 connections per instance after the Q1 capacity review

description: Core fact survives multiple consolidation cycles spanning 90 days

facts.content: The data retention policy requires GDPR-covered user event logs to be deleted after 365 days
Interim note: audit team reviewed retention policy and found it compliant
Quarterly compliance review completed with no changes to retention policy

query: How long are GDPR-covered user event logs retained before deletion?

Sprint 13 goal is to harden the API gateway — in progress

description: Consolidation after contradiction leaves newer fact dominant

facts.content: The JWT signing algorithm was HS256 with a shared secret
Security audit finding: HS256 is insufficient; migrated to RS256 asymmetric keys

query: What JWT signing algorithm is currently in use?
